title: AIR Hooks Index
description: Index of hooks that run in response to agent lifecycle events. Each hook points to a directory containing a HOOK.json definition and any associated scripts.

propertyNames.description: Hook identifier key. Must be alphanumeric with hyphens or underscores.

Hook.description: A hook that runs a command in response to an agent lifecycle event. The hook's runtime definition (event, command, args, etc.) lives in a HOOK.json file within the directory referenced by path.

title.description: Human-readable display name for the hook.

description.description: Concise description of what this hook does.

path.description: Relative path to the hook directory containing HOOK.json and any associated scripts.

references.description: IDs of reference documents this hook depends on.
